title: AP Vendor Profile - Functional Test Plan
overview: Functional testing of the Assistive Partner (AP) Vendor Profile page on the Y4J platform. Covers navigation, page structure, organization card, account status, documents, organization details, contact information, edit profile functionality, data validation, UI consistency, security, accessibility, error handling, and data privacy.

testCases.title: Verify Top Navigation Bar Elements
testCases.preconditions: AP account is approved and active. AP is logged in. Dashboard is loaded.
expectedResults: Profile link is visible and highlighted when active

testCases.title: Navigate to Vendor Profile Page
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Dashboard is loaded.
expectedResults: User is redirected to Vendor Profile page

testCases.title: Verify Authentication Requirement
testCases.preconditions: AP is not logged in. Browser session is cleared.
steps: Attempt to access profile page directly via URL
expectedResults: Unauthenticated users are redirected to login page
Profile page is not accessible without valid session

testCases.title: Verify Page Title and Subtitle
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Vendor Profile page is loaded.
expectedResults: Subtitle displays: "Manage your organization details and account information"

testCases.title: Verify Edit Profile Button
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Vendor Profile page is loaded.
expectedResults: Edit Profile button appears on top-right

testCases.title: Verify Organization Card Elements
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Vendor Profile page is loaded.

testCases.title: Verify Account Status Display
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Vendor Profile page is loaded.
expectedResults: All data is fetched from backend

testCases.title: Verify Status Badge Colors
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Vendor Profile page is loaded.

testCases.title: Verify Empty State Message
testCases.preconditions: AP account exists without uploaded documents. AP is logged in.
steps: Login as Assistive Partner without documents

testCases.title: Verify Organization Details Fields
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Vendor Profile page is loaded.

testCases.title: Verify Mandatory Field Indicators
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Vendor Profile page is loaded.

testCases.title: Verify Contact Information Fields
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Vendor Profile page is loaded.
expectedResults: Website is displayed as clickable link

testCases.title: Verify Social Media Links
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in with social media links on profile. Vendor Profile page is loaded.
expectedResults: Social media links have appropriate icons

testCases.title: Switch to Editable Mode
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Vendor Profile page is loaded in read-only mode.
testCases.postconditions: Profile page is in edit mode

testCases.title: Verify Editable Mode Elements
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Profile page is in edit mode.
testCases.postconditions: Profile page remains in edit mode

testCases.title: Cancel Editing and Revert Changes
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Profile page is in edit mode.
expectedResults: All fields revert to last saved values
testCases.postconditions: Profile page is in read-only mode with original values

testCases.title: Save Profile Changes Successfully
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Profile page is in edit mode.
testCases.postconditions: Profile page is in read-only mode with updated values

testCases.title: Validate Mandatory Fields
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Profile page is in edit mode.
expectedResults: Error message indicates field is required
testCases.postconditions: Profile page remains in edit mode with validation errors shown

testCases.title: Validate Email Format
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Profile page is in edit mode.
testCases.postconditions: Profile page remains in edit mode with validation errors shown

testCases.title: Validate Phone Number Format
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Profile page is in edit mode.
expectedResults: Error indicates phone must be numeric
testCases.postconditions: Profile page remains in edit mode with validation errors shown

testCases.title: Verify Card Layout Consistency
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Vendor Profile page is loaded.
expectedResults: All cards follow rounded card layout

testCases.title: Verify Icon Theme Consistency
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Vendor Profile page is loaded.

testCases.title: Verify Input Field Styling
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Profile page is in edit mode.
testCases.postconditions: Profile page remains in edit mode

testCases.title: Verify Read-Only Field Styling
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Vendor Profile page is loaded in read-only mode.
expectedResults: Read-only fields show disabled state styling

testCases.title: Verify Responsive Layout
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Vendor Profile page is loaded.
steps: Resize browser to desktop and tablet sizes
testCases.postconditions: Profile page remains functional at all tested sizes

testCases.title: Verify User Can Only Edit Own Profile
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Vendor Profile page is loaded.
steps: Verify profile data matches logged-in user
expectedResults: User can only edit their own profile data
Profile data belongs to logged-in user

testCases.title: Verify Keyboard Navigation
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Vendor Profile page is loaded.
steps: Use Tab key to navigate all elements
expectedResults: Page is fully navigable via keyboard

testCases.title: Verify Screen Reader Compatibility
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Vendor Profile page is loaded. Screen reader is available.

testCases.title: Verify Color Contrast
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Vendor Profile page is loaded.

testCases.title: Verify Text Size Adjustability
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Vendor Profile page is loaded.
testCases.postconditions: Profile page remains functional at adjusted text size

testCases.title: Verify No External Data Sharing
testCases.preconditions: AP is logged in. Vendor Profile page is loaded.
expectedResults: No personal information shared outside portal
testCases.postconditions: Profile data remains within the portal
